resultado.dsFundamentoLegal: Fundamento Legal: Art. 25º, Inciso I da Lei nº 8.666 de 21/06/1993.
resultado.dsJustificativa: Justificativa: Considerando carta de exclusividade da empresa para o fornecimento do item.
resultado.dsDetalhada: DENSÍMETRO, NOME DENSIMETRO Bettersizer S2-WD laser particle size analyzer is the intelligent automatic model,  main specifications are as follows: 1. Size Range: Wet: 0.02-2000  m; Dry: 0.1-2000  m 2. Number of Photodetector: 90 pcs 3. Repeatability: Wet  0.5% (GBRM D50) Dry 3% (GBRM D50) 4. Accuracy: Wet  0.5 % (GBRM D50) Dry 3% (GBRM D50)  5. Light Source: 635nm, 2mW, red semiconductor  laser, Class I laser product.6. Alignment: auto alignment  7. Sample Dispersi on System: liquid and dry. 8. Liquid Sistem: built in ultrasonic. 9. Water cir culation: automatic self-priming water intake and drainage. 10. Optics Design:  patented dual lens system 11. Dry Sistem: Pressure - 0.1-0.8MPa (Continuous A djustable) 12. Dispersion Medium: Compressed air or inert gas.
resultado.noFornecedorVencedor: ACIL & WEBER COMERCIO E SERVICOS LTDA
